naming_law: public copy says 'calls'; program facts interpolate from src/lib/referral-constants.ts REFERRAL_TERMS

additive_keys.referral_applied: boolean — present ONLY when a valid, non-self ref applied on a fresh opt-in
additive_keys.bonus_calls: number — the referee bonus granted (REFERRAL_TERMS.BONUS_CALLS) when referral_applied
additive_keys.key: string — the caller's own newly-minted av_free_ key, returned over their own request; never logged

surfaces.additive_policy: the three referral fields are ADDITIVE and conditional (spread only when referral.applied); the pre-W1 shape {ok, optin_at, inserted} is byte-stable for non-referral opt-ins

forbidden_substrings: an UNMASKED full referrer email (renderAdminPayoutsPage masks via maskEmail; the self-stats page shows only the caller's own code)

surfaces.note: the 30%/500/12 months/$50 strings are RENDERED output (interpolated from REFERRAL_TERMS); the source renderer holds no hardcoded literals (chapter gate)

surfaces.auth: isAdminAuthorized (Bearer / ?key=ADMIN_API_KEY / admin cookie); 401 otherwise — same gate as /admin/chat-analytics, /admin/geo-dashboard, /admin/subscribers
surfaces.pii: payout queue masks the owner email via maskEmail; no outcome_* anywhere
